texto: Some writers need to sink in order to feel what their characters feel
autor: in order to write their characters with the truest feeling possible. Those closest to those writers end up feeling the effects of that process. It takes a strong person to be with an emphatic writer.
explicacao: Citação de in order to write their characters with the truest feeling possible. Those closest to those writers end up feeling the effects of that process.
